detaileddescription.para: class with CNC machine emulation settings Generated from class MR::CNCMachineSettings. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).
Constructs an empty (default-constructed) instance. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_CNCMachineSettings_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

Constructs an array of empty (default-constructed) instances, of the specified size. Will never return null. The array must be destroyed using MR_CNCMachineSettings_DestroyArray(). Use MR_CNCMachineSettings_OffsetMutablePtr() and MR_CNCMachineSettings_OffsetPtr() to access the array elements.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Offsets a pointer to an array element by i positions (not bytes). Use only if you're certain that the pointer points to an array element. The reference to the parameter ptr might be preserved in the return value.

Generated from constructor MR::CNCMachineSettings::CNCMachineSettings. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in the constructed object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_CNCMachineSettings_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a heap-allocated instance of MR_CNCMachineSettings. Does nothing if the pointer is null.
Destroys a heap-allocated array of MR_CNCMachineSettings. Does nothing if the pointer is null.

detaileddescription.para: Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::operator=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The reference to things referred to by the parameter _other (if any) might be preserved in this object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. When this function is called, this object will drop any object references it had previously.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::setRotationAxis. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rotationAxis can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::getRotationAxis. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::setRotationLimits. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rotationLimits is optional. To keep it empty, pass a null pointer.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::getRotationLimits. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::setRotationOrder. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rotationAxesOrder can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::getRotationOrder. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::setFeedrateIdle. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::getFeedrateIdle. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::setHomePosition. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter homePosition can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::getHomePosition. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::operator==. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rhs can not be null. It is a single object.
Generated from method MR::CNCMachineSettings::operator!=. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rhs can not be null. It is a single object.
